mapper.sql: alevel_content_block_id, owner_type, owner_id, block_type, content_html, content_text, structure_json, source_file_id, source_page_no, source_bbox_json, sort_order, status, remark, create_time, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.select: SELECT FROM alevel_content_block WHERE owner_type = #{ownerType} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND status = 1 AND delete_flag = '1' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, alevel_content_block_id ASC
